name: jstack-loop
description: Top-level JStack command for bounded, durable, evidence-verified goal loops.

interface.shortDescription: Bounded goal loops with evidence gates
interface.longDescription: Top-level Codex workflow that composes native Goal mode with JStack single-lead, specialist-team, or full-team execution. It preserves a Git-bound contract, durable hash-chained state, scoped autonomy, convergence breakers, and current evidence before completion.
defaultPrompt: Complete this goal through a bounded, evidence-verified JStack loop.
